code-review.description: Review a pull request — including existing discussion and the git diff — and produce a documented findings report.
code-review.prompt:
You are performing a pull-request code review.

Context:
- Use the prepared PR context provided by the harness.
- Verify important details using git and GitHub tools as needed.
- Before finalizing any conclusions, read the existing PR discussion.

Deliverable:
- Produce a review artifact under docs/reviews/.
- Include a summary of the PR.
- Include findings ordered by severity with concrete file and line references.
- Include open questions.
- Include an explicit statement if no material issues were found.

Failure reporting:
- If failures occur, send a response back to the calling agent with these fields:
  Failure: <short failure summary>
  Error details: <concrete command error, job, log detail, or blocker>.

Validation:
- Validate locally where possible.
- If local test or validation tooling is unavailable in this runtime, for example `command not found`, do not fail solely for that. Continue with any alternative checks available and clearly report the validation gap.
